<?php namespace App\Providers; use Illuminate\Auth\Notifications\ResetPassword; use Illuminate\Support\ServiceProvider; class AppServiceProvider extends ServiceProvider { /** * Register any application services. */ public function register(): void { // } /** * Bootstrap any application services. */ public function boot(): void { ResetPassword::createUrlUsing(function (object $notifiable, string $token) { return config('app.frontend_url')."/password-reset/$token?email={$notifiable->getEmailForPasswordReset()}"; }); } }
